// Generated by github.com/romshark/datapages. DO NOT EDIT.

// Package action provides generators for datastar action hypertext references.
// These references must be used in the templates.
package action

import (
	"strconv"
	"strings"
)

// POSTPageIndexSet references /set/{value}/{s_value}/{s_s_value}/
func POSTPageIndexSet(value int32, s_value int32, s_s_value string) string {
	s_s_s_value := strconv.FormatInt(int64(value), 10)
	s_s_s_s_value := strconv.FormatInt(int64(s_value), 10)
	var b strings.Builder
	b.Grow(len("@post('/set/") + len(s_s_s_value) + len("/") + len(s_s_s_s_value) + len("/") + len(s_s_value) + len("/')"))
	b.WriteString("@post('/set/")
	b.WriteString(s_s_s_value)
	b.WriteString("/")
	b.WriteString(s_s_s_s_value)
	b.WriteString("/")
	b.WriteString(s_s_value)
	b.WriteString("/')")
	return b.String()
}
